title: U.A.E. Expels Pakistani Workers, as Pakistan’s Peacemaking Creates a Rift
summary_full: As Pakistan mediates between the U.S. and Iran, its ties to the Emirates have deteriorated. Pakistani workers say they are now being sent home en masse.
summary_public: As Pakistan mediates between the U.S. and Iran, its ties to the Emirates have deteriorated. Pakistani workers say they are now being sent home en masse.
